name: HSBC Elite Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 60,000 bonus HSBC Reward Points (worth ~$360 toward travel redemption or $300 statement credit). Points worth 0.6 cents each toward travel, 0.5 cents toward cash.

earning_rates.category: Travel (airlines, hotels, car rentals, travel agencies)

annual_credits.name: Airline incidental credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $400 annual credit for airline incidentals (seat upgrades, baggage fees, lounge passes, etc.)

annual_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Lounge Access
other_benefits.description: Unlimited Priority Pass lounge access for cardholder and guests

other_benefits.name: Fine Hotels & Resorts (FHR)
other_benefits.description: Access to Amex FHR program benefits

other_benefits.name: Annual fee offset
other_benefits.description: Points can be redeemed to offset the $495 annual fee at preferential rate

fhr_thc.notes: Access to Amex Fine Hotels & Resorts and The Hotel Collection

notes: HSBC Elite has a $495 annual fee with benefits worth over $2,900 in the first year and $2,000 annually thereafter (per HSBC). Requires HSBC Premier banking relationship to apply. No foreign transaction fees. LoungeKey access with PPS (Priority Pass Select). Strong travel insurance package.
